channel.title: Backend Development on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Backend Development on yexca'Blog

item.title: GoLang Backend Intro
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash A simple, no-framework Go backend. Backend development is typically interface-driven, or, as some say, CRUD engineering. This article will use Go to show how to read data from a database and return JSON. Database This example reads category names and IDs from a MySQL database’s categories table. Here’s the database structure: 1 2 3 4 5 6 DROP TABLE IF EXISTS categories ; CREATE TABLE categories ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY …
